Part.Source: Event Start /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GridNotasFiscais.Rows = Page.Rows &GridNotasFiscaisCurrentPage = 1 &GridNotasFiscaisCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridNotasFiscaisPageCount = -1 GridVeiculos.Rows = Page.Rows &GridVeiculosCurrentPage = 1 &GridVeiculosCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridVeiculosPageCount = -1 GridPagamentos.Rows = Page.Rows &GridPagamentosCurrentPage = 1 &GridPagamentosCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridPagamentosPageCount = -1 GridEnvolvidos.Rows = Page.Rows &GridEnvolvidosCurrentPage = 1 &GridEnvolvidosCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridEnvolvidosPageCount = -1 &OqueFazer.Clear() &OqueFazer.AddItem(0, 'Operações para o CIOT') &OqueFazer.AddItem(1, 'Gerar PDF deste CIOT') GridNotasFiscaisPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridNotasFiscais.Rows GridVeiculosPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridVeiculos.Rows GridPagamentosPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridPagamentos.Rows GridEnvolvidosPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridEnvolvidos.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod Do 'LoadOperacao' EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //The variable '&GridNotasFiscaisPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. //The variable '&GridVeiculosPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. //The variable '&GridPagamentosPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. &CancelarPagamento.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWIconActionColumn' &GridLancamentosOpeDtaLib.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &GridLancamentosOpePgtBan.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &GridLancamentosOpePgtAge.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &GridLancamentosOpePgtCon.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &GridLancamentosOpePgtVal.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' //The variable '&GridEnvolvidosPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &GridEnvolvidosPageCount = GridEnvolvidos.PageCount &GridEnvolvidosCurrentPage = GridEnvolvidos.CurrentPage &GridEnvolvidosLinhaPag = GridEnvolvidos.Rows &GridVeiculosPageCount = GridVeiculos.PageCount &GridVeiculosCurrentPage = GridVeiculos.CurrentPage &GridVeiculosLinhaPag = GridVeiculos.Rows &GridNotasFiscaisPageCount = GridNotasFiscais.PageCount &GridEnvolvidosCurrentPage = GridNotasFiscais.CurrentPage &GridNotasFiscaisLinhaPag = GridNotasFiscais.Rows &GridPagamentosPageCount = GridPagamentos.PageCount &GridPagamentosCurrentPage = GridPagamentos.CurrentPage &GridPagamentosLinhasPag = GridPagamentos.Rows EndEvent Event GridNotasFiscais.Load &GridNotasFiscaisPageCount = 1 &GridNotasFiscaisPagina = 0 &GridNotasFiscaisLinhaPag = GridNotasFiscais.Rows For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, OpeCod, OpeNfeCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod Where OpeCod = &parmOpeCod &GridNotasFiscaisNumero = Trim(Str(OpeNfeNro)) + '/' + Trim(OpeNfeSer) &GridNotasFiscaisOpeNfeDta = OpeNfeDta &GridNotasFiscaisOpeNfeNcm = OpeNfeNcm &GridNotasFiscaisOpeNfeVlrTot = OpeNfeVlrTot &GridNotasFiscaisOpeNfeQtdMerEmb = Trim(Str(OpeNfeQtdMerEmb)) + UPPER(Trim(OpeNfeUndMed.EnumerationDescription())) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &GridNotasFiscaisPagina += 1 If &GridNotasFiscaisPagina = &GridNotasFiscaisLinhaPag &GridNotasFiscaisPageCount += 1 &GridNotasFiscaisPagina = 0 EndIf Load EndFor EndEvent Event GridVeiculos.Load &GridVeiculosPageCount = 1 &GridVeiculosPagina = 0 &GridVeiculosLinhaPag = GridVeiculos.Rows For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, OpeCod, OpeVeiCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod Where OpeCod = &parmOpeCod &GridVeiculosOpeVeiPla = OpeVeiPla &GridVeiculosOpeVeiTipCar = UPPER(OpeVeiTipCar.EnumerationDescription()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &GridVeiculosPagina += 1 If &GridVeiculosPagina = &GridVeiculosLinhaPag &GridVeiculosPageCount += 1 &GridVeiculosPagina = 0 EndIf Load EndFor EndEvent Event GridPagamentos.Load &GridPagamentosPageCount = 1 &GridPagamentosPagina = 0 &GridPagamentosLinhasPag = GridPagamentos.Rows For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, OpeCod, OpePgtCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod Where OpeCod = &parmOpeCod &GridLancamentosEmpCod = EmpCod &GridLancamentosFilCod = FilCod &GridLancamentosOpeCod = OpeCod &GridLancamentosOpePgtSts = OpePgtSts &GridLancamentosOpePgtCod = OpePgtCod &GridLancamentosOpeDtaLib = OpeDtaLib &GridLancamentosOpePgtBan = OpePgtBan &GridLancamentosOpePgtAge = OpePgtAge &GridLancamentosOpePgtCon = OpePgtCon &GridLancamentosOpePgtVal = OpePgtVal /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &CancelarPagamento = !'' If (&GridLancamentosOpePgtSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO And &AuxOpeSts = Status_Ciot.Autorizado Or &AuxOpeSts = Status_Ciot.Digitando) &CancelarPagamento.Class = !'Attribute' Else &CancelarPagamento.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &CancelarPagamento.ColumnClass = iif(&GridLancamentosOpePgtSts = Status_AtivoInativo.INATIVO, !'WWIconActionColumn WWColumnLineThrough WWColumnLineThroughFirstColumn', !'WWIconActionColumn') &GridLancamentosOpeDtaLib.ColumnClass = iif(&GridLancamentosOpePgtSts = Status_AtivoInativo.INATIVO, !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough', !'WWColumn') &GridLancamentosOpePgtBan.ColumnClass = iif(&GridLancamentosOpePgtSts = Status_AtivoInativo.INATIVO, !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough', !'WWColumn') &GridLancamentosOpePgtAge.ColumnClass = iif(&GridLancamentosOpePgtSts = Status_AtivoInativo.INATIVO, !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough', !'WWColumn') &GridLancamentosOpePgtCon.ColumnClass = iif(&GridLancamentosOpePgtSts = Status_AtivoInativo.INATIVO, !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough', !'WWColumn') &GridLancamentosOpePgtVal.ColumnClass = iif(&GridLancamentosOpePgtSts = Status_AtivoInativo.INATIVO, !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough', !'WWColumn') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &GridPagamentosPagina += 1 If &GridPagamentosPagina = &GridPagamentosLinhasPag &GridPagamentosPageCount += 1 &GridPagamentosPagina = 0 EndIf Load EndFor EndEvent Event GridEnvolvidos.Load &GridEnvolvidosPageCount = 1 &GridEnvolvidosPagina = 0 &GridEnvolvidosLinhaPag = GridEnvolvidos.Rows For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, OpeCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod Where OpeCod = &parmOpeCod If OpeAntCod <> 0 &GridEnvolvidosTipo = 'CONTRATANTE' &AuxPesCod = OpeAntCod &GridEnvolvidosPesCod = &AuxPesCod Do 'LoadEnvolvidos' &GridEnvolvidosPesRaz = &EnvolvidosPesRaz &GridEnvolvidosPesFonNum= &AuxPesFonNum &GridEnvolvidosPagina += 1 If &GridVeiculosPagina = &GridEnvolvidosLinhaPag &GridEnvolvidosPageCount += 1 &GridEnvolvidosPagina = 0 EndIf Load EndIf If OpeConCod <> 0 &GridEnvolvidosTipo = 'CONTRATADO' &AuxPesCod = OpeConCod &GridEnvolvidosPesCod = &AuxPesCod Do 'LoadEnvolvidos' &GridEnvolvidosPesRaz = &EnvolvidosPesRaz &GridEnvolvidosPesFonNum= &AuxPesFonNum &GridEnvolvidosPagina += 1 If &GridVeiculosPagina = &GridEnvolvidosLinhaPag &GridEnvolvidosPageCount += 1 &GridEnvolvidosPagina = 0 EndIf Load EndIf If OpeMotCod <> 0 &GridEnvolvidosTipo = 'MOTORISTA' &AuxPesCod = OpeMotCod &GridEnvolvidosPesCod = &AuxPesCod Do 'LoadEnvolvidos' &GridEnvolvidosPesRaz = &EnvolvidosPesRaz &GridEnvolvidosPesFonNum= &AuxPesFonNum &GridEnvolvidosPagina += 1 If &GridVeiculosPagina = &GridEnvolvidosLinhaPag &GridEnvolvidosPageCount += 1 &GridEnvolvidosPagina = 0 EndIf Load EndIf If OpeDesCod <> 0 &AuxPesCod = OpeDesCod Do 'LoadEnvolvidos' &GridEnvolvidosPesCod = &AuxPesCod &GridEnvolvidosPesRaz = &EnvolvidosPesRaz &GridEnvolvidosTipo = 'DESTINATÁRIO' &GridEnvolvidosPesFonNum= &AuxPesFonNum &GridEnvolvidosPagina += 1 If &GridVeiculosPagina = &GridEnvolvidosLinhaPag &GridEnvolvidosPageCount += 1 &GridEnvolvidosPagina = 0 EndIf Load EndIf If OpeTomCod <> 0 &GridEnvolvidosTipo = 'TOMADOR' &AuxPesCod = OpeTomCod Do 'LoadEnvolvidos' &GridEnvolvidosPesCod = &AuxPesCod &GridEnvolvidosPesRaz = &EnvolvidosPesRaz &GridEnvolvidosPesFonNum= &AuxPesFonNum &GridEnvolvidosPagina += 1 If &GridVeiculosPagina = &GridEnvolvidosLinhaPag &GridEnvolvidosPageCount += 1 &GridEnvolvidosPagina = 0 EndIf Load EndIf If OpeSubCon <> 0 &GridEnvolvidosTipo = 'SUB-CONTRATANTE' &AuxPesCod = OpeAntCod Do 'LoadEnvolvidos' &GridEnvolvidosPesCod = &AuxPesCod &GridEnvolvidosPesRaz = &EnvolvidosPesRaz &GridEnvolvidosPesFonNum= &AuxPesFonNum &GridEnvolvidosPagina += 1 If &GridVeiculosPagina = &GridEnvolvidosLinhaPag &GridEnvolvidosPageCount += 1 &GridEnvolvidosPagina = 0 EndIf Load EndIf If OpeSigCod <> 0 &GridEnvolvidosTipo = 'CONSIGNATÁRIO' &AuxPesCod = OpeAntCod Do 'LoadEnvolvidos' &GridEnvolvidosPesCod = &AuxPesCod &GridEnvolvidosPesRaz = &EnvolvidosPesRaz &GridEnvolvidosPesFonNum= &AuxPesFonNum &GridEnvolvidosPagina += 1 If &GridVeiculosPagina = &GridEnvolvidosLinhaPag &GridEnvolvidosPageCount += 1 &GridEnvolvidosPagina = 0 EndIf Load EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Exit EndFor EndEvent Event GridNotasFiscaisPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridNotasFiscaisPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridNotasFiscaisCurrentPage -= 1 GridNotasFiscais.PreviousPage() Case GridNotasFiscaisPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridNotasFiscaisCurrentPage += 1 GridNotasFiscais.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridNotasFiscaisPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridNotasFiscaisCurrentPage = &PageToGo GridNotasFiscais.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridNotasFiscaisPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GridNotasFiscais.Rows = GridNotasFiscaisPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridNotasFiscaisCurrentPage = 1 GridNotasFiscais.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridVeiculosPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridVeiculosPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridVeiculosCurrentPage -= 1 GridVeiculos.PreviousPage() Case GridVeiculosPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridVeiculosCurrentPage += 1 GridVeiculos.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridVeiculosPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridVeiculosCurrentPage = &PageToGo GridVeiculos.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridVeiculosPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GridVeiculos.Rows = GridVeiculosPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridVeiculosCurrentPage = 1 GridVeiculos.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPagamentosPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPagamentosPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridPagamentosCurrentPage -= 1 GridPagamentos.PreviousPage() Case GridPagamentosPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridPagamentosCurrentPage += 1 GridPagamentos.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPagamentosPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridPagamentosCurrentPage = &PageToGo GridPagamentos.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPagamentosPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GridPagamentos.Rows = GridPagamentosPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridPagamentosCurrentPage = 1 GridPagamentos.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridEnvolvidosPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridEnvolvidosPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridEnvolvidosCurrentPage -= 1 GridEnvolvidos.PreviousPage() Case GridEnvolvidosPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridEnvolvidosCurrentPage += 1 GridEnvolvidos.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridEnvolvidosPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridEnvolvidosCurrentPage = &PageToGo GridEnvolvidos.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridEnvolvidosPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ GridEnvolvidos.Rows = GridEnvolvidosPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridEnvolvidosCurrentPage = 1 GridEnvolvidos.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &CancelarPagamento.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ CancelarPagamento_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event CancelarPagamento_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcOperacaoTransporteCancelarPagamento.Create(&GridLancamentosEmpCod, &GridLancamentosFilCod, &GridLancamentosOpeCod, &GridLancamentosOpePgtCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event CancelarPagamento_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &OqueFazer.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &OqueFazer = 1 Do 'Do ImprimirPDF' EndCase &OqueFazer = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoVoltar' Return /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'Do ImprimirPDF' prcNovoEFrete_Login.Call(&Token, &ProtocoloServico, &StatusLogin) If &StatusLogin = 200 prcNovoEFRETE_GerarPDF.Call(&OpeNroCiot, &Token, &StatusPDF, &NomeArquivo) If &StatusPDF = 200 RCOOpenWindow.LinkOpen = &NomeArquivo RCOOpenWindow.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) Else Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Erro!", 'Não foi possível gerar o PDF. ERRO: ' + Trim(Str(&StatusPDF)), DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) EndIf Else Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Erro!", &StatusLogin.ToString(), DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) EndIf If not &Token.Trim().IsEmpty() prcNovoEFrete_Logout.Call(&Token, &StatusLogOut) EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadOperacao' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, OpeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where OpeCod = &parmOpeCod &OpeNroCiot = OpeNroCiot If OpeEmiGra = True &TipoCIOT = 'Este CIOT é GRATUITO!' Else &TipoCIOT = 'Este CIOT tem a sua emissão PAGA!' EndIf //Carrega Informações] &parmOpeTipVia = OpeTipVia &parmDeclaradoEm = Trim(ToFormattedString(OpeDta)) &parmOpeDtaIni = OpeDtaIni &parmOpeDtaFim = OpeDtaFim &parmOpeNcm = OpeNcm &AuxOpeSts = OpeSts Do Case Case OpeSts = Status_Ciot.Cancelado tbCiotCancelado.Visible = 1 &AuxPesCod = OpePesCan Do 'GetPessoa' &TxtCiotCancelado = 'Este CIOT foi CANCELADO em ' + Trim(ToFormattedString(OpeDtaCan)) + &AuxPesRaz + ', pelo motivo de: "' + OpeMotCan.Trim() + '"' &TxtCiotCancelado = &TxtCiotCancelado.Trim() Case OpeSts = Status_Ciot.Encerrado tbCiotCancelado.Visible = 1 &TxtCiotCancelado = 'Este CIOT foi ENCERRADO em ' + Trim(ToFormattedString(OpeDtaEnc)) &TxtCiotCancelado = &TxtCiotCancelado.Trim() OtherWise tbCiotCancelado.Visible = 0 EndCase For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, OpeCod, OpeImpCod Where OpeImpCod = 1 &parmOpeImpIRRF = OpeImpIRRF &parmOpeImpSest = OpeImpSest &parmOpeImpInss = OpeImpInss &parmOpeImpIssqn= OpeImpIssqn Exit EndFor If OpeTipVia = PefServiceTipoViagem.Padrao For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, OpeCod, OpeViaCod &AuxOpeViaCod = OpeViaCod &parmOpeNroDoc = OpeNroDoc &AuxCidIBGE = OpeOriCidCod Do 'GetCidade' &parmCidadeOrigem = Trim(&AuxNomeCidade) &AuxCidIBGE = OpeDstCidCod Do 'GetCidade' &parmCidadeDestino = Trim(&AuxNomeCidade) &parmOpeTotVia = OpeTotOpe For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, OpeCod, OpeViaCod, OpeValCod Where OpeViaCod = &AuxOpeViaCod &parmOpeTotAdi = OpeTotAdi &parmOpeTotQui = OpeTotQui &parmOpeTotCom = OpeTotCom &parmOpeTotPed = OpeTotPed Exit EndFor Exit EndFor Else tbViagemPadrao.Visible = 0 tbNCM.Visible = 0 EndIf Exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'GetCidade' For Each Order EmpCod, CidCod Where EmpCod = &parmEmpCod Where CidIBGE = &AuxCidIBGE &AuxNomeCidade = Trim(CidNom) + '/' + (UfeCod) Exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'LoadEnvolvidos' For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &AuxPesCod &EnvolvidosPesRaz = UPPER(Trim(PesRaz)) For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod &AuxPesFonNum = Trim(PesFonNum) Exit When None &AuxPesFonNum = 'N/A' EndFor Exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'GetPessoa' For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &AuxPesCod &AuxPesRaz = ', por: ' + UPPER(Trim(PesRaz)) Exit When None &AuxPesRaz = '' EndFor EndSub
